headline: Camden Property Trust (CPT) Valuation Check After Recent Short Term Share Price Rebound
summary: Why Camden Property Trust is back on investor radar Camden Property Trust (CPT) stock has quietly outperformed broader real estate peers recently, with a gain of about 9% over the past month and roughly 9% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Camden Property Trust. The recent 7 day share price return of 6.5% and 30 day share price return of 8.9% build on a modest 2.5% year to date gain. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of 13.3% contrasts with a flat 1 year outcome,...
